title: Raven Registry
description: Central manifest of all projects using Raven. Lives at ~/.raven/registry.json locally and backed up to giggsoinc/raven-registry on GitHub.

raven_current_version.description: Current Raven engine version from raven-core/VERSION

registry_repo.description: GitHub URL of the raven-registry backup repo

last_updated.description: ISO8601 timestamp of last registry update

name.description: Project name — matches directory name by default

path.description: Absolute path to project root on this machine

remote.description: GitHub remote URL — null if no remote

installed_version.description: Raven version installed in this project (from .raven/raven_version)

last_synced.description: ISO8601 timestamp of last successful sync

registered_at.description: ISO8601 timestamp when project was first registered

components.description: Which Raven components are installed in this project
